heading: Budgetary treatment of the Postal Service Fund
label: 2009a Budgetary treatment of the Postal Service Fund
notes: References in TextThe Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act of 1985, referred to in par. (3), is title II of , , . Sections 251 and 252 of the Act are classified to sections 901 and 902, respectively, of Title 2, and were amended generally by , , , 1388–581. children.label: A
children.text: the budget of the United States Government as submitted by the President, or

children.label: B
children.text: the congressional budget (including allocations of budget authority and outlays provided therein);
shall be exempt from any general budget limitation imposed by statute on expenditures and net lending (budget outlays) of the United States Government; and

shall be exempt from any order issued under part C of the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act of 1985, and shall not be counted for purposes of calculating the deficit under section 3(6) of the Congressional Budget and Impoundment Control Act of 1974 for purposes of comparison with the maximum deficit amount under the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act of 1985 nor counted in calculating the excess deficit for purposes of sections 251 and 252 of the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act of 1985, for any fiscal year.1See References in Text note below.1
